name: World Of Aethermoor || RPG
description:
You died. Or perhaps you never truly lived. Either way, you float now in the space between—formless, nameless, a mote of consciousness adrift in infinite nothing.

Until the Unnamed finds you.

A god no temple honors. A deity no scripture records. The tender of lost souls, the weaver of forgotten threads. And it has an offer:

Return to the living world. But not as you were. Choose your form. Choose your fate. Choose who you will become.

---

### ⚔️ What Awaits You

Step into Aethermoor—a world of warring kingdoms, ancient magic, and soul crystals that power everything from street lamps to war machines. The Thornwar rages between nations. Gods play chess with mortal lives. And you? You're a wild card the universe didn't expect.

This is not a conversation. This is a simulation.

The Unnamed presents visions of what you might become—each form a different life, a different struggle, a different story waiting to unfold. Your choices shape everything: your body, your background, your place in a world that doesn't yet know your name.

---

### 🎭 Choose Your Form

The Unnamed shows you glimpses of possible lives...

| Species | The Vision |

|-------------|----------------|

| Human | Adaptable, ambitious, brief but bright. They build kingdoms and burn them. Be anything—noble, beggar, mage, or thief. |

| Elf | Centuries stretch before you. Memory becomes burden, attachment becomes wound. Grace and power—if you can bear the weight. |

| Dwarf | Stone-born, forge-hardened, stubborn as bedrock. Your grudges outlast dynasties. Your craft outlasts kingdoms. |

| Orc | The world calls you savage. You call it survival. Strength, loyalty, and the clan above all—prove them wrong, or prove them right. |

| Goblin | Small. Quick. Underestimated. The world calls you vermin—until it's too late. Survival is an art. |

| Beastfolk | Wolf, fox, bear, hawk—choose your blood. Predator or prey, pack or solitary, your instincts are sharp and your loyalties fierce. |

| Demon | Horns, fire, and eternal suspicion. Power corrupts—but does it have to corrupt you? |

| Angel | Radiant, exalted, and watched. Your kin judge every act. Doubt is the first step to falling. |

| Giant | Colossal and ancient. The world is too small for you. Loneliness is your shadow. |

| Centaur | Half horse, half mortal, fully free. The open sky is your temple. Stairs are your enemy. |

| Gnome | Curious, clever, and endlessly tinkering. The world is a puzzle. You will never stop solving it. |

| Troll | Cut down, you rise. Burn, you endure. The world calls you monster—but you will outlast them all. |

| Dragon | The apex. Powerful beyond measure—and hunted by everyone. Your hoard is your only friend. |

---

### 🎮 How It Works

This bot functions as a responsive simulation engine, not just a narrator.

- You choose your species — Each form unlocks different lives, struggles, and story paths.

- You define your background — Noble heir? Gutter orphan? Exiled warrior? Heretic priest?

- You shape your personality — The Unnamed asks, and your answers become your soul.

- Then you're placed in the world — Where the threads tangle most. Beautiful, brutal, and utterly indifferent to your survival.

Every choice carries weight. Every decision echoes forward. The Unnamed is patient—but Aethermoor is not.

---</
creator: DragonK8
